task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/PI_instructions.txt.

task_completion.description: Create the first Ekos Sequence file for M81.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a sequence for M81, a save dialog for 'm81_lrgb.esq', or a file manager/terminal showing 'm81_lrgb.esq' has been created.

task_completion.description: Create the second Ekos Sequence file for NGC1499.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a sequence for NGC1499, a save dialog for 'ngc1499_ha.esq', or a file manager/terminal showing 'ngc1499_ha.esq' has been created.

task_completion.description: Create the third Ekos Sequence file for M42.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a sequence for M42, a save dialog for 'm42_hdr.esq', or a file manager/terminal showing 'm42_hdr.esq' has been created.
The Ekos Scheduler module showing the populated observing queue, a save dialog for 'master_schedule.esl', or a file manager/terminal showing 'master_schedule.esl' has been created.

task_completion.description: Save all generated files in the ~/Documents/Ekos/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal 'ls' output confirming that the .esq and .esl files are located specifically inside the /home/ga/Documents/Ekos/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Ekos GUI to generate the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars/Ekos application open with the Capture and Scheduler modules active, rather than the agent manually typing XML/text into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by creating empty files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'touch m81_lrgb.esq' or creating blank files in a file manager without using Ekos.

integrity.description: The agent entered the target data into the Ekos application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekos GUI should visibly contain the target names (M81, NGC1499, M42) and sequence parameters before the files are saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output directory is /home/ga/Documents/Ekos. The expected sequence files are exactly named: m81_lrgb.esq, ngc1499_ha.esq, and m42_hdr.esq. The expected master schedule file is exactly named: master_schedule.esl.
